bugs.error_message: Email verification flow broken: invalid/expired links and account already verified
bugs.root_cause: 1. Signup generated token but didn't save it to DB (used generateToken() instead of generateEmailVerificationToken). 2. verify-email endpoint didn't check if account was already verified. 3. resend-verification didn't log when account already verified. 4. No auto-redirect after verification.
bugs.fix: 1. Changed signup to use generateEmailVerificationToken() after creating user. 2. Added check in verify-email for already-verified accounts with clearer messaging. 3. Added logging in resend-verification for already-verified case. 4. Added auto-redirect to signin after 3 seconds on successful verification.

bugs.root_cause: background-color: #fff0ee → #fef3c7; color: #8f281f → #92400e; border: 1px solid #ffd2cb → 1px solid #fde68a
bugs.fix: Changed background-color: #fff0ee → #fef3c7; color: #8f281f → #92400e; border: 1px solid #ffd2cb → 1px solid #fde68a

bugs.root_cause: Async call without await — returned Promise instead of value
bugs.fix: Added await to async call

bugs.error_message: Next.js middleware not running: file was named proxy.js instead of middleware.js
bugs.root_cause: Next.js requires the middleware entry point to be named middleware.js (or middleware.ts) at the project root. proxy.js was never picked up by the framework.
bugs.fix: Renamed proxy.js → middleware.js and ensured the exported function is named `middleware`.

bugs.error_message: hashPassword is not a function (imported from @/lib/auth which does not export it)
bugs.root_cause: lib/auth.js only exports signToken, verifyToken, generateToken. hashPassword lives in lib/password.js.
bugs.fix: Split import: `generateToken` stays in @/lib/auth; `hashPassword` moved to @/lib/password.

bugs.error_message: import POST handler used raw `new ObjectId(institutionId)` instead of resolveInstitutionId()
bugs.root_cause: GET handler already used resolveInstitutionId() correctly, but POST handler had a stale `new ObjectId(institutionId)` call that bypasses BYPASS_AUTH string-ID handling.
bugs.fix: Changed POST handler line 78: `const iOid = new ObjectId(institutionId)` → `const iOid = await resolveInstitutionId(institutionId)`.
